FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.title: Furina
FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.description:
The absolute focus of the stage.
Invite companions to co-perform with the actors in the tower.
FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.cardsModifierDes: Furina's cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.unlockText: Play a game with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
FURINA_CHARACTER_FURINA.goldMonologue: I must admit, this is quite efficient.
